title: Wind-Farm-GNO-v1
author: Schøler, Jens Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a mirror of the code available at the  Github repo  containing the code for the publication: https://doi.org/10.5194/wes-2025-261 Graph Neural Operator for wind farm wake flow.   To use this version, you have to unzip the mixed_extra_files.zip archive. Alternatively, consider cloning it from the repo.

To use this version, you have to unzip the mixed_extra_files.zip archive. Alternatively, consider cloning it from the repo.
